jd_text: A leading developer is expanding its data centre operations globally and requires an Executive HR leader to drive this growth. This is not a traditional HR role. It is a strategic leadership position focused on building, scaling, and aligning HR functions across multiple regions. You will report directly to the Chief HR Officer and play a key role in shaping the organisation’s global workforce strategy. Key Responsibilities Lead HR strategy across USA, GCC, and APAC operations Design and implement organisational structures to support rapid growth Drive workforce planning aligned with business expansion Develop and execute Learning & Development frameworks Build and embed culture across multi-regional teams Lead organisational development initiatives Partner with leadership to support scaling of data centre operations Candidate Requirements Minimum 15+ years of HR experience Currently operating at Director or VP level Mandatory data centre experience, with the last two roles in the sector Experience working across multiple regions (USA, GCC, APAC preferred) Proven ability to operate in high-growth, fast-paced environments Strong track record in Organisational design Workforce planning L&D strategy Culture and transformation Organisational development What This Role Offers Direct reporting line to senior leadership Exposure to global operations and strategy Opportunity to build and shape HR functions at scale Long-term growth within a developer expanding into data centres Important Note This role requires deep, recent experience within the data centre sector. Candidates without this will not be considered. Apply For a confidential discussion or to apply, please get in touch directly.
